note: STARTER holdout for the assess bake-off (#2555). Cases are difficulty-balanced (2 easy / 3 medium / 2 hard) and dimension-diverse, but their expected composite ranges are first-pass labels that need human review before this gate is trusted for real promotions. min_pass 7.0 is intentionally stricter than the rubric's day-to-day 5.5 floor — the sealed lock is the authoritative promotion bar.
